channel.title: Posts on K0MOB
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on K0MOB

item.description:
As a reminder, our next club meeting will be held on Tuesday, July 21, 2026, 6:30 pm, at the Logan Street Church of Christ, 1301 E Logan Street, Moberly, Mo 65270. Hope to see everyone there!!

Hello everyone! Wow, time is sure flying. We are already getting close to our July meeting!

We have many things to discuss at the meeting this month, some informational, some very important, so I hope everyone can make it.

Omar Bradley

We arhonored to be the Randolph county birthplace (in Clark MO) of the late Omar Bradley 1893-1981 the last USA 5 star general.
